summary: The footage shows a vehicle traveling along a two-lane road bordered by trees and hillsides. A white sedan approaches from the opposite direction and passes closely beside the recording vehicle, resulting in a brief moment of proximity.

events_timeline.event: A white sedan travels alongside the ego-vehicle, passing very close to it.

uncertainties: The precise distance between the vehicles during the pass is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There is minimal risk due to the short duration of the pass and the lack of overt endangerment.
